LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT VERICREST FINANCIAL INC AND THE BANK OF NEW YORK'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT ADEQUATELY ADDRESSED THE DEFICIENCIES IDENTIFIED IN THE ORDER ON THE PRIOR DEMURRER. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT CLARIFIES THAT THE FORECLOSURE OCCURRED, THAT PLAINTIFF IS SUING ON THE LOAN CONTRACT, AND THAT THE UCL CAUSE OF ACTION IS BASED ON A VIOLATION OF CIVIL CODE 2923.5. MR. LILLY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SONIA WONG, CSR #11288

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT VERICREST FINANCIAL, INC, THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON AS TRUSTEE FOR CIT HOME EQUITY LOAN TRUST 2002-2'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (WRONGFUL DISCLOSURE) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST AMEND TO CLARIFY HOW FAR LONG THE FORECLOSURE PROCESS IS OR IF IT HAS BEEN COMPLETED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (BREACH OF IMPLIED COVENANT) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE THE FACT REGARDING THE UNDERLYING CONTRACT OR ATTACH A COPY OF THE CONTRACT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF THE UCL) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS CITED THE WRONG CIVIL CODE PROVISION REGARDING NEGOTIATING WITH THE LENDER. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (ACCOUNTING) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF IS NOT ALLEGING THAT THE DEFENDANT OWES HIM MONEY. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.

Defendant Vericrest Financial, Inc And The Bank Of New York'S Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS VERICREST FINANCIAL, INC AND THE BANK OF NEW YORK'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Marc D. Bender of the Law Offices of David G. Finkelstein (650.353.4503 x106) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party; Christopher A. Lilly of TroyGould PC (310.553.4441 x1265) appearing via Court Call for defendants and moving parties.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. The request for punitive damages is adequately pled. Mr. Lilly to submit a proposed form of order. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288

Defendant Vericrest Financial Inc; The Bank Of New York'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT VERICREST FINANCIAL INC AND THE BANK OF NEW YORK'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Marc D. Bender of the Law Offices of David G. Finkelstein (650.353.4503 x106) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party; Christopher A. Lilly of TroyGould PC (310.553.4441 x1265) appearing via Court Call for defendants and moving parties.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: overruled. The amended complaint adequately addressed the deficiencies identified in the order on the prior demurrer. The amended complaint clarifies that the foreclosure occurred, that plaintiff is suing on the loan contract, and that the UCL cause of action is based on a violation of Civil Code 2923.5. Mr. Lilly to submit a proposed form of order. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT VERICREST FINANCIAL, INC, THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON AS TRUSTEE FOR CIT HOME EQUITY LOAN TRUST 2002-2'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendant's Demurrer to the 1st cause of action (wrongful disclosure) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must amend to clarify how far long the foreclosure process is or if it has been completed. Defendant's Demurrer to the 2nd cause of action (breach of implied covenant) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must allege the fact regarding the underlying contract or attach a copy of the contract.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 3rd cause of action (Violation of the UCL) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff has cited the wrong Civil Code provision regarding negotiating with the lender.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 4th cause of action (accounting) is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff is not alleging that the defendant owes him money. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS VERICREST FINANCIAL, INC, THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON AS TRUSTEE FOR CIT HOME EQUITY LOAN TRUST 2002-2'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendant's motion to strike is granted with leave to amend. Plaintiff must adequately amend his substantive claims to support this prayer for relief. The Court denies the motion on other grounds. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
